summary: Iteration 88 - REDD+ Impact National Tab Testing Complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. GET /api/redd-impact/national-metrics returns valid JSON with all 6 required sections (carbon_impact, conformite, social_impact, mrv_national, cooperatives, investor_metrics). All monetary values are in XOF. API requires admin authentication (returns 403 without token). Frontend: 'Impact REDD+' tab visible in SuperAdminDashboard tab list with data-testid='redd-impact-tab'. Clicking tab loads real data from API - displays KPI row (CO₂: 419.5T, Hectares: 123.1ha, Score: 7.1/10), Revenue section (8.2M XOF), 5-year Projection table (2026-2030), Conformité (EUDR 14%), Social Impact (68 SSRTE visits, 41 children), MRV National, and Parcelles coverage bar.

minor.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthenticated requests - both are valid auth rejection codes

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <tbody> - cosmetic only, table renders correctly

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/redd-impact/national-metrics returns 200 with valid JSON for admin user
PASS: API returns 403 without authentication token (access denied)
PASS: Response contains all 6 required sections: carbon_impact, conformite, social_impact, mrv_national, cooperatives, investor_metrics
PASS: carbon_impact has: total_co2_tonnes, total_hectares_couverts, avg_carbon_score, foret_equivalente_ha, annual_revenue_xof, five_year_projection, parcels_assessed, total_parcels
PASS: conformite has: eudr_compliance_rate, eudr_verified_parcels, eudr_total_parcels, ars_distribution (bronze/argent/or), ars_total_assessed
PASS: social_impact has: total_ssrte_visits, risk_distribution (critique/eleve/modere/faible), children_identified, ici_total_cases, ici_resolved, ici_resolution_rate
PASS: mrv_national has: total_redd_visits, practices_adoption_by_category, zones_covered, avg_conformity_score, mrv_coverage_rate
PASS: cooperatives has: total_cooperatives, total_farmers, total_field_agents
PASS: investor_metrics has: pipeline_credits_tonnes, pipeline_value_xof, roi_per_coop_xof, five_year_projection, carbon_price_xof_per_tonne
PASS: All monetary values are in XOF (no USD fields)
PASS: five_year_projection has 5 entries for years 2026-2030 with tonnes_co2, revenue_xof, hectares
PASS: Frontend 'Impact REDD+' tab visible in SuperAdminDashboard with data-testid='redd-impact-tab'
PASS: Clicking tab triggers API call and displays real data (not placeholder/empty)
PASS: KPI row displays: CO₂ Séquestré (419.5 T), Hectares Couverts (123.1 ha), Score Carbone Moy. (7.1/10), Forêt Équivalente (2.1 ha), Coopératives (26), Agents Terrain (13)
PASS: Revenus Carbone section shows 8.2M XOF annual revenue, 293.6 T CO₂ pipeline, 19650 XOF/tonne price
PASS: Projection 5 Ans table shows years 2026-2030 with CO₂, Revenus XOF, Hectares columns
PASS: Conformité & Certifications shows EUDR 14%, ARS distribution (Bronze: 1, Argent: 1, Or: 0)
PASS: Impact Social (SSRTE/ICI) shows 68 visits, 41 children identified, risk distribution bars, ICI resolution 25%
PASS: MRV National section visible with REDD+ visits, zones covered, conformity score, coverage rate
PASS: Couverture d'Évaluation des Parcelles progress bar visible
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 88 verified the new 'Impact REDD+' tab in SuperAdminDashboard. The tab is accessible at /admin/strategic and requires admin login. API endpoint GET /api/redd-impact/national-metrics returns aggregated REDD+ metrics from MongoDB collections (parcels, ars_farmer_data, ssrte_visits, ssrte_cases, redd_tracking_visits, users). All monetary values are in XOF. The frontend displays real data including CO₂ tonnes, hectares, carbon score, revenue projections, EUDR compliance, ARS distribution, SSRTE/ICI social impact, and MRV national metrics.

mocked_api_note.REDD+ Impact API: NOT MOCKED - all data comes from real MongoDB collections
mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent
